title: Thaumaturgy
body:
# Thaumaturgy
Thaumaturgy is a flower themed magic mod made for 1.21.1.

To start off, craft an Interceptor with the recipe in the gallery!

Then, obtain a Sacrificial Knife in an Mineshaft.

And then, use various flowers in your offhand with a knife in your main hand on the Interceptor to trigger its various rituals!


## Rituals
#### Poppy (Narcotic)
Gives all nearby entities the **Deadwalk** effect, slowing movement but increasing regeneration.

#### Peony (Transcendant)
Gives all nearby players the **Transcedant** ability. In this state, players cannot deal or take damage, along with being slightly transparent!!!!

#### Wither Rose (Carrion)
Gives all nearby entities the Wither effect for 10s!

#### Torchflower (Luminous)
Makes all nearby entities glow for 30s!

#### Cornflower (Abundance)
For each entity in the radius, the user will gain five experience points!

## Pouches
Pouches can also be made, which allow you to throw certain ritual flowers as projectiles.
